\tzpentry{ID5493}{Fitness Field Strength Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5493 introduces Fitness Field Strength Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathrm{Fitness}(n) \sim \sum_{k\ge 0} a_k\,e^{-S_k\,n!}\,n^{\alpha_k}(\log n)^{\beta_k}. \end{align}
